name: Dak's Eggnog Oat Bran Bread (Bread Machine)
recipeIngredient: 2 egg whites or 1 egg or 1/4 cup Egg substitute
recipeInstructions:
1. Set the machine's browning control to light.
2. Put all the ingredients into the bread machine pan in the order listed.
3. Select "Oat/French" setting and push start.
